name: Miss Allie's Chicken and Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place half of the chicken in a Dutch oven (or heavy casserole with tight-fitting lid) and season with salt and pepper.
3. Cover with onions and mushrooms. Add half of the butter.
4. Add remaining chicken, season, and dot with butter.
5. Cover and bake for about 45 minutes. Remove chicken pieces; add rice and stir into cooking fat. Add boiling stock. Place chicken over mixture. Recover and bake for about 1 hour, or until rice and chicken are tender and almost all liquid has been absorbed.
